title: genista triacanthos subsp. scorpioides
intro: Genista triacanthos subsp. scorpioides, also known as the lesser thorny broom, is a shrub-like plant in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Genista triacanthos subsp. scorpioides include its ability to improve immune function, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
